name: micro-courant
description: Decentralized Community Energy Grid Settlement & Microbilling Infrastructure (Stellar DePIN System)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run install:sdk
scripts.install:frontend: cd frontend/household-dashboard && npm install && cd ../operator-dashboard && npm install && cd ../governance-dashboard && npm install
scripts.install:backend: cd backend/telemetry && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install && cd ../billing-engine && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:telemetry" "npm run dev:api-gateway" "npm run dev:billing"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:backend: cd backend/telemetry && npm test && cd ../api-gateway && npm test && cd ../billing-engine && npm test
